rows.source_ref: jaeleone, 'BRB - Bollinger Ribbon Bands', Babypips forum thread, 2026, https://forums.babypips.com/t/brb-bollinger-ribbon-bands/1309168
rows.concept: Price on the correct side of a multi-deviation Bollinger 'ribbon' envelope, confirmed by EMA13 direction and MACD zero-line, taken for a 2:1 target on index M1 during NY-morning sessions.
rows.eligibility_reason: Native BB/EMA/MACD confluence, deterministic core with swing-based stop + 2:1 target on available index M1 data; but which band pair is the 'Double White Lines' is unspecified among 8 BB settings, and divergence (ABCD)/higher-timeframe checks are discretionary.
rows.notes: Indicators: BB(21) at devs 2/0.08/0.5/0.75/1/1.25/1.5/1.75, EMA(13), MACD(8,13,9). Entry: price above/below DWL for buy/sell + EMA colour match + MACD above/below zero. Stop at last swing high/low, target 2x. Author trades primarily indices (US30/WS30, NAS100/NDX, GER40/GDAXI, UK100), also FX majors. A community EA (BRB_Quantitative_Engine.ex5 by Mahdifd_1) automates the same rules; a US30 M1 set file cites Thu+Fri 08:00-11:00 NY as optimal, self-reported 43% win rate / 2:1 R:R / +4.8%/month with no OOS evidence. Source is a promotional forum (author pushes YouTube/live sessions, declines to publish results) and EmeraldEyes acknowledges curve-fitting risk -> low priority.

notes: single core strategy; referenced EA + set file are an automation of the same rules, folded into notes not a separate row
